NVDA.description: AI/GPU leader. Earnings move entire semiconductor complex.

sympathy_plays.notes: Moves nearly 1:1 with NVDA on earnings. Best sympathy play.
Custom AI chip maker. Slower follower, lower beta.
Manufactures NVDA chips. Supply chain proxy.
Data center networking/custom silicon. High AI exposure.

AAPL.description: Consumer tech leader. Moves consumer discretionary and suppliers.

sympathy_plays.notes: Modem supplier. Reacts to iPhone demand commentary.
RF chip supplier for iPhone. High revenue concentration.

MSFT.description: Enterprise cloud and AI. Moves cloud/SaaS complex.

sympathy_plays.notes: Cloud competitor. Reacts to cloud growth commentary.
Enterprise SaaS peer. Follows MSFT AI/cloud sentiment.
Data cloud. Reacts to enterprise spending commentary.

META.description: Social/ad tech. Moves digital advertising complex.

sympathy_plays.notes: High beta social media peer. Amplifies META moves.
Ad-supported platform. Follows ad spend trends.

AMZN.description: E-commerce and cloud. Dual exposure to consumer and enterprise.

sympathy_plays.notes: E-commerce platform. Reacts to online spending trends.
Cloud competitor. Follows AWS growth commentary.
